sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for i, n in enumerate(nodes):
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    cr = (min(rows)+max(rows))//2
    cc = (min(cols)+max(cols))//2
    print(i, n['color'], n['pixels'], cr, cc)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
